userId.title: User ID
userId.description: Your CentriConnect/MyPropane account user ID. This is shown in the MyPropane iOS app account/profile settings.

deviceId.title: Device ID
deviceId.description: The Device ID printed on the card included with your MyPropane sensor.

deviceAuthCode.title: Device Authentication Code
deviceAuthCode.description: The Device Authentication Code printed on the card included with your MyPropane sensor.

tankCapacityGallons.title: Tank Capacity Override (gallons)
tankCapacityGallons.description: Optional override for total tank capacity. Leave blank to use the TankSize value returned by CentriConnect.

pollIntervalMinutes.title: Poll Interval (minutes)
pollIntervalMinutes.description: How often to check the propane level in minutes. Default is 360 (6 hours), matching the typical Centri/MyPropane update cadence.

lowThreshold.title: Low Level Threshold (%)
lowThreshold.description: Propane percentage threshold you can use for HomeKit automations from the propane percentage sensor. Default is 30.

batteryLowThreshold.title: Battery Low Threshold (%)
batteryLowThreshold.description: Monitor battery percentage below which HomeKit reports low battery. Default is 20.

apiBaseUrl.title: API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the CentriConnect API. Only change this if the endpoint moves.
